# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_IID: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}
  GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}
  GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}

build-push-release:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building..."
  only:
    - main

deploy-to-dev:
  extends: .deploy-stage
  environment:
    name: dev
    auto_stop_in: 1h
  when: $GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
  allow_failure: true

deploy-to-staging:
  extends: .deploy-stage
  environment:
    name: staging
    auto_stop_in: 1h
  when: $GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
  allow_failure: true

deploy-to-production:
  extends: .deploy-stage
  environment:
    name: production
    auto_stop_in: 1h
  when: $GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
  tags:
    - deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
  only:
    - main

.deploy-stage:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying..."
  environment:
    name: ${environment.name}
    auto_stop_in: 1h

after_script:
  stage: after_script
  when: always
  script:
    - if [ "$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" = "main" ]; then
        git config user.name 'CI Bot'
        git config user.email 'ci-bot@example.com'
        git add .
        git commit -m "${GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE} (${GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}): feat(${GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_IID})"
        git push origin main
      fi

artifacts:
  paths:
    - dist/**
